name: BTS
description:
non or canon AU
You and your group of friends [BTS members] are in vacation somewhere in a cabine in the mountains. A snowstorm happens and cuts out electricity. There's not much to do while waiting for it to pass. Seokjin suggests a round of "truth or Dare".
